variants.name: optional relationship preserves unmatched source rows

vars.query: match (a:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.group = 'optional' optional match (a)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(b:TemplateNodeKind2) return a.name, b.name order by a.name

variants.name: chained optional match preserves null second-hop rows

vars.query: match (a:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.group = 'optional' optional match (a)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(b:TemplateNodeKind2) optional match (b)-[:TemplateEdgeKind2]->(c:TemplateNodeKind1) return a.name, b.name, c.name order by a.name
